playbook.intent: Raw feature request → ready-to-ship slice with validated signal + spec + flag plan + success metric.
playbook.scope: Per-feature on-demand session: signal validated, MVP cut to bone, spec written, flag plan decided, success metric defined — all before any code is generated. Exit artifact is build-ready spec.md with rollout + success criteria.

success-criteria.criterion: Signal validated: ≥3 customer quotes or analytics anomaly
Micro-MVP defined: smallest slice that delivers value

stage.name: Validate signal
stage.intent: Is this real demand or a single loud voice?

tasks.task: Find ≥3 customer quotes OR analytics signal
Run mom-test on 2 prospects if unclear

stage.decision-gate: Advance if signal is real. Park to waitlist if uncertain. Kill if only 1 loud voice.

stage.name: Prioritise
stage.intent: Does this beat current top-3 backlog item?
stage.decision-gate: Advance when priority is decided. Refuse to scope below-cutoff items.

stage.name: Cut MVP
stage.decision-gate: Advance when scope fits 1-3 days of solo work. Cut more if not.

stage.name: Spec
stage.decision-gate: Advance when criteria are atomic + checkable.

stage.name: Flag plan
stage.intent: Decide rollout: behind flag, % rollout, targets.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: spec with flag + rollout + success metric. Hand off to daily cycle.

extra.value: [Full discovery — that's done upstream in continuous-discovery, Implementation — handed off to daily SDD cycle]
['Feature request exists (from inbox, dashboard, or roadmap)', Existing backlog with priority context]
[Skipping signal validation because the request is from a paying customer — even paying customers ask for noise, Specifying without cutting first — produces 3x the scope]
['Could I delete 30% of the spec right now without losing the value?', 'Is the success metric measurable inside 2 weeks of rollout?']

{human: faion get-content new-feature-scoping-session --format md, agent: faion get-content new-feature-scoping-session --format context, json: faion get-content new-feature-scoping-session --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
